title: The 100 Most Searched Things on Google (February 2026)
text: This article identifies the 100 most-searched keywords on Google in February 2026. Among the television programs tracked, Stranger Things ranks as the most searched TV show, appearing at position 69 with 25,962,682 searches in the past 30 days. The article identifies it as the most searched TV show among the categories tracked. The top five most-searched items overall were Google with 1.3 billion searches, YouTube with 1.2 billion, weather with 798.8 million, ChatGPT with 557.5 million, and Facebook with 480.5 million. The data shows that utility queries remain a core use case with navigation to other platforms dominating search behavior. This snapshot reveals how entertainment content competes with practical search queries in terms of volume.
